title: HQ picture is stale by default
discovery: Higher headquarters should never see a live map. Their picture is an accumulation of late, scattered, filtered reports.
evidence: source_library/03_cross-channel-attack-ch9.md:16-21 - supply shortfalls and late reports blocked a clean breakout.
source_library/04_utah-beach-to-cherbourg-carentan.md:16-21 - artillery communications were unavailable and some men never received the order.
why: This justifies an information-lag layer in the command tree and prevents the player from assuming HQ has perfect strategic knowledge.

variable.name: hq_picture_freshness
variable.definition: How current the highest command picture is relative to ground truth.

mechanic: Delayed command map with stale-state propagation.
pressure: Decision quality drops when the command picture falls behind reality.
